name: React Bootstrap
description: The most popular front-end framework, rebuilt for React with true React components

description.value: The most popular front-end framework, rebuilt for React with true React components
description.comment: Each component is built from scratch as a true React component, without dependencies like jQuery

active-maintenance.comment: Active - v2.10.10 released May 11, 2025; 4,598 total commits; 480+ contributors; used by ~1.9 million projects

initial-release.comment: Created December 27, 2013; one of the oldest React libraries

framework.comment: React exclusive; current v2.x supports Bootstrap 5, with legacy versions for Bootstrap 4 (v1.x) and Bootstrap 3 (v0.33.x)

styling-approach.comment: Relies entirely on Bootstrap's stylesheet; requires separate Bootstrap CSS import; supports both vanilla CSS and Sass customization

component-model.comment: Styled components following Bootstrap's visual design; compatible with thousands of existing Bootstrap themes

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (65.7% of codebase); first-class type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with SSR but requires 'use client' directive for components using React Context (ThemeProvider); dynamic imports with ssr: false as alternative

rsc-compatible.comment: Not compatible with React Server Components; components must be client components due to React Context usage (ThemeProvider)

design-system.comment: Implements Bootstrap 5 design system; compatible with Bootstrap ecosystem

dark-mode.comment: Bootstrap 5.3+ includes built-in color mode support for light/dark themes via data-bs-theme attribute

theming-system.comment: Theming through Bootstrap's Sass variables; extensive customization of colors, spacing, typography

css-variables.comment: Bootstrap 5 uses extensive CSS custom properties for theming; prefixed with --bs-

design-tokens.comment: Bootstrap provides design tokens via Sass variables and CSS custom properties

rtl-support.comment: Bootstrap 5 includes built-in RTL support with separate RTL stylesheet

component-count.comment: ~38 distinct components across Forms, Components, and Layout categories

text-input.comment: FormControl component with text, password, email, search variants

multi-select.comment: No built-in multi-select component; native HTML multiple attribute available but no enhanced UI

checkbox.comment: FormCheck component with type='checkbox'; supports groups and inline layout

radio.comment: FormCheck component with type='radio' for radio button groups

switch-toggle.comment: FormCheck with type='switch' for toggle switches

slider.comment: FormRange component; single thumb only, no dual-thumb range slider

number-input.comment: Uses native HTML number input via FormControl type='number'; no custom increment/decrement UI

color-picker.comment: Uses native HTML color input via FormControl type='color'; no custom picker UI

date-picker.comment: No built-in date picker component; uses native HTML date input

time-picker.comment: No built-in time picker component; uses native HTML time input

file-upload.comment: FormControl with type='file' for file uploads; no built-in preview

input-groups.comment: InputGroup component for combining inputs with text, buttons, or dropdowns

input-with-dropdown.comment: InputGroup supports dropdown buttons attached to inputs

button-groups.comment: ButtonGroup and ButtonToolbar for grouped buttons

split-button.comment: SplitButton component with main action and dropdown menu

table.comment: Table component with striped, bordered, hover, and responsive variants

data-table.comment: No advanced data table with sorting, filtering, or pagination; basic Table only

list-view.comment: ListGroup component with styled list items, badges, and actionable items

card.comment: Card component with header, body, footer, and image variants

avatar.comment: No dedicated avatar component; use Image with styling

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge with pill prop for rounded tag/pill appearance

alert.comment: Alert component with dismissible and styled variants

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with ToastContainer for positioning; supports stacking and auto-hide

progress-bar.comment: ProgressBar component with labels, striped, and animated variants

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner component with border and grow variants

skeleton.comment: Placeholder component for loading skeletons with glow and wave animations

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component with focus trapping, keyboard navigation (Escape to close), and accessibility features

drawer-sheet.comment: Offcanvas component for slide-in panels from any edge

popover.comment: Popover component with custom positioning and triggers

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown component with menu items, dividers, and headers

tabs.comment: Tabs and Tab components for tab-based navigation

vertical-tabs.comment: No built-in vertical tabs; Nav with flex-column can achieve similar effect

navigation-menu.comment: Navbar component with responsive navigation, dropdowns, and collapse

sidebar.comment: No dedicated sidebar component; Offcanvas can be used for collapsible sidebars

grid.comment: Container, Row, Col components for 12-column responsive grid system

stack.comment: Stack component for vertical/horizontal flex layouts with gap support

container.comment: Container component with fluid and responsive breakpoint options

divider.comment: No dedicated divider component; use <hr> with Bootstrap classes

aspect-ratio.comment: Bootstrap includes ratio helper classes; no dedicated React component but compatible with className

collapsible.comment: Collapse component for expandable/collapsible content with animation

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations

form-libraries.comment: Community react-bootstrap-formik package for Formik integration; no official React Hook Form adapter but compatible via standard patterns

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in CSS transitions for Collapse, Fade; no documented external animation library integration

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons; any icon library can be used independently

date-libraries.comment: No date picker or date library integration

aria-compliant.comment: Components implement WAI-ARIA patterns; each component built with accessibility in mind

keyboard-navigation.comment: Keyboard support for interactive components; Escape closes modals, arrow keys in dropdowns

screen-reader-tested.comment: Bootstrap components designed to work with screen readers; testing confirms accessibility for keyboard and screen reader users

focus-management.comment: Modal traps focus ensuring keyboard navigation cycles through modal content; autoFocus works reliably

wcag-level.comment: Bootstrap aims for WCAG 2.2 A/AA/AAA compliance; some color combinations may need adjustment for full contrast compliance

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate - ARIA-compliant, keyboard navigation, focus management; some color contrast issues noted in documentation; authors may need to add additional ARIA attributes for complex use cases

bundle-size-full.comment: ~115 kB minified + gzipped for v2.10.9; has 13 dependencies

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable; actual bundle depends on components imported

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking with modern bundlers; import specific components to reduce bundle size

zero-runtime.comment: Requires JavaScript runtime for component behavior; styling via Bootstrap CSS

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be dynamically imported and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive API reference, code examples for each component, migration guides, version-specific docs; interactive examples in docs

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component examples with source code

storybook.comment: No official public Storybook; documentation site serves as component explorer

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma kit; community Bootstrap 5 UI kits available on Figma Community

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; install via npm/yarn

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~1.2 million weekly downloads as of December 2025

commercial-support.comment: MIT open source; community support via Stack Overflow, Discord, and GitHub

style-override.comment: Override via className, inline style prop, or Bootstrap CSS variables; bsPrefix prop for custom class prefixes

compound-components.comment: Uses compound component pattern (e.g., Card.Body, Card.Header, Dropdown.Menu, Modal.Header)

render-props.comment: No render props pattern; uses traditional prop-based customization

slots.comment: No named slots pattern; uses compound components and children prop

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode; components require Bootstrap CSS for proper appearance
